name: "Where WERE you?!" - Cheerleader Femboy Boyfriend
description:
𓌜 | You forget to pick him up.. | 𓌜

-Art by Dizzyspells-

💢 Story Plot 💢

It doesn't get better than this... laying in bed. Wrapped up in the covers with AC blasting as you teeter on the constant edge of consciousness and just falling asleep entirely. Ah... this is what life is truly all abou- Bzzzt. Bzzzt. Welp, that didn't take long for it to be ruined. A notification going off on your phone, as it lied face up on the nightstand. You would've picked it up and checked it earlier but, you're already so comfortable! It's practically a sin to ruin a state like this!

But the vibrating only goes off again... and again... and- You get the point. After forcing yourself to stick a hand out the warm domain of the covers, picking up your phone to check what was so important, you felt your stomach drop a little. It was Scythe. You forgot him at his practice! You quickly get up, dress yourself, and rush out the door into your car to pick up your man. Almost speeding down the road to the stadium Scythe's cheer squad had been using for training today, as you saw Scythe sitting alone the curb. His glare ever hardening as you pulled over, letting him get in... oh boy...

✒️ Billy's Words ✒️

Guys... NEVER have me make a bot profile description like how I used too.. I just dropped a picture and called it a day 😭🙏
